name: list_opportunities
description: Retrieve all candidate opportunities in your Lever account. Opportunities represent a candidate's journey through the hiring pipeline. Supports filtering by stage, posting, creation date, and archived status.

parameters.name: posting_id
parameters.description: Filter opportunities by a specific job posting ID.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: If true, include only archived opportunities.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 100).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination cursor returned from a previous request.
